title: CryptoCbGuard has no lifetime binding to Client; use-after-free possible
description: register_cryptocb() stores a *mut whClientContext into wolfCrypt's global CryptoCb table and returns a CryptoCbGuard with no lifetime tying it to the Client. If the caller drops the Client while holding the guard (e.g. let guard = client.register_cryptocb()?; drop(client);), the Client::drop runs wh_Client_Cleanup and frees the inner Box, leaving a dangling pointer in the wolfCrypt table. Any subsequent wolfCrypt operation dispatched to DEV_ID dereferences freed memory.
